# Citadel Digital Signage

> The easiest, most powerful digital signage software to manage your screens, engage your customers, and drive revenue.

Citadel is a cloud-based digital signage platform that lets businesses create, schedule, and publish content to any screen from one dashboard. No IT team required.

## Key Facts

- Product: Cloud digital signage software (SaaS)
- Website: https://citadeldigitalsignage.com
- App: https://app.citadeldigitalsignage.com
- Support: https://support.citadeldigitalsignage.com
- Free trial: 14 days, no credit card required
- Uptime SLA: 99.9%
- Screens managed: 3,000+

## Features

- Drag-and-drop content creation
- Real-time scheduling and playlist management
- Canva integration for design
- Offline playback (screens keep playing without internet)
- Multi-location management from one dashboard
- Built-in apps: media player, dashboards, streams, weather, news feeds, YouTube
- Role-based access control
- Analytics and engagement tracking
- Works with any screen (horizontal or vertical orientation)

## Industries Served

- Healthcare: patient education, wayfinding, wait-time displays
- Retail: promotions, product info, in-store engagement
- Restaurants: digital menu boards, specials, order status
- Corporate: internal comms, meeting room displays, KPI dashboards
- Gyms & Spas: class schedules, promotions, member engagement
- Transportation: real-time schedules, wayfinding, alerts
- Education: campus announcements, event boards, emergency alerts
- Finance: rate boards, queue management, compliance displays
- Manufacturing: production dashboards, safety info, shift schedules
